Class OracleVectorStore.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<OracleVectorStore.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.oracle.OracleVectorStore.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
VectorStore.Builder<OracleVectorStore.Builder>
Enclosing class:
OracleVectorStore
public static class OracleVectorStore.Builder extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<OracleVectorStore.Builder>
Builder class for creating OracleVectorStore instances.

Provides a fluent API for configuring all aspects of the Oracle vector store, including database connection, schema initialization, vector dimensions, and search parameters.

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Loïc Lefèvre, Christian Tzolov, Soby Chacko, Thomas Vitale, chabinhwang

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder(org.springframework.jdbc.core.JdbcTemplate jdbcTemplate, EmbeddingModel embeddingModel)
      Sets the JdbcTemplate to be used for database operations.
      Parameters:
      jdbcTemplate - the JdbcTemplate instance
      embeddingModel - the Embedding Model to be used

  • Method Details

    • tableName

      public OracleVectorStore.Builder tableName(String tableName)
      Sets the table name for vector storage.
      Parameters:
      tableName - the name of the table to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • indexType

      public OracleVectorStore.Builder indexType(OracleVectorStore.OracleVectorStoreIndexType indexType)
      Sets the vector index type.
      Parameters:
      indexType - the index type to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if indexType is null

    • distanceType

      public OracleVectorStore.Builder distanceType(OracleVectorStore.OracleVectorStoreDistanceType distanceType)
      Sets the distance type for vector similarity calculations.
      Parameters:
      distanceType - the distance type to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if distanceType is null

    • dimensions

      public OracleVectorStore.Builder dimensions(int dimensions)
      Sets the number of dimensions for the vector space.
      Parameters:
      dimensions - the number of dimensions (must be between 1 and 65535)
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if dimensions is not within valid range

    • searchAccuracy

      public OracleVectorStore.Builder searchAccuracy(int searchAccuracy)
      Sets the search accuracy parameter.
      Parameters:
      searchAccuracy - the search accuracy value (must be between 1 and 100)
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if searchAccuracy is not within valid range

    • initializeSchema

      public OracleVectorStore.Builder initializeSchema(boolean initializeSchema)
      Sets whether to initialize the database schema.
      Parameters:
      initializeSchema - true to initialize schema, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • removeExistingVectorStoreTable

      public OracleVectorStore.Builder removeExistingVectorStoreTable(boolean removeExistingVectorStoreTable)
      Sets whether to remove existing vector store table before initialization.
      Parameters:
      removeExistingVectorStoreTable - true to remove existing table, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • forcedNormalization

      public OracleVectorStore.Builder forcedNormalization(boolean forcedNormalization)
      Sets whether to force vector normalization.
      Parameters:
      forcedNormalization - true to force normalization, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • build

      public OracleVectorStore build()
      Description copied from interface: VectorStore.Builder
      Builds and returns a new VectorStore instance with the configured settings.
      Returns:
      a new VectorStore instance
